# Austin Spraggins | Co-Founder, CTO & Agentic AI Engineer

> Austin builds AI agents that ship production software—and the products, native clients, data systems, and game pipelines those agents support. He is Co-Founder and CTO at LineCrush Inc in Fresno, California.

## Contact

- Email: spragginsdesigns@gmail.com
- Location: Fresno, California, USA
- Status: Open to contracts and consulting

## Links

- [Portfolio](https://www.spragginsdesigns.xyz): Main portfolio
- [LineCrush](https://www.linecrush.com): Production sports intelligence platform
- [GitHub](https://github.com/spragginsdesigns): Public engineering work
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/spragginsdesigns/): Professional profile
- [Twitter / X](https://twitter.com/spragginsdesign): Social updates

## Current Work

### LineCrush

Austin architects a production sports research and analytics platform spanning:

- AI-generated picks and product explanations
- Real-time signal search across sports interviews, podcasts, news, and social context
- Vision/OCR-powered betslip analysis and shareable reports
- Automated grading, reporting, notifications, and data-production pipelines
- A Next.js web application, native SwiftUI iOS app, native Kotlin/Compose Android app, and browser extensions
- PostgreSQL, Redis, WebSockets, Python services, AWS, Vercel, and Ubuntu infrastructure

Verified repository-scale indicators as of July 2026:

- 27,000+ commits across the production monorepo
- Nearly 1,000 tracked TSX modules
- 366 tracked Next.js API handlers
- 64 tracked agent-skill definitions

### Autonomous Engineering Agents

Austin built a provider-neutral software-delivery system around Codex and Claude. It can pick up Linear issues and move through investigation, implementation, real product-path proof, code review, safety gates, and release. Durable sessions recover interrupted work rather than restarting from zero.

The surrounding agent platform includes:

- Shared skills, commands, repository maps, and operating rules
- Custom MCP tooling and cross-platform engineering lanes
- Model routing, fallbacks, recovery, and evidence-backed closeout
- Web, Python, SwiftUI, Kotlin, infrastructure, and release workflows

### Product AI

Austin uses OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and vision/OCR workflows for different jobs rather than treating one model as a universal answer. Production systems include structured prompting, response parsing, streaming, retries, fallbacks, evaluation, and product-level quality gates.

### LineCrush Games

Austin is building a private AI-native game studio with original Godot 4.7 projects including Space Miner, RockHunter, and MERIDIAN.

- Space Miner is a Steam Deck-first 2.5D survival miner
- Windows and Linux / Steam Deck builds are smoke-proven
- Agents can operate Godot workflows, create and wire scenes, run headless tests, capture playtest evidence, and produce repeatable exports
- Asset pipelines cover generated concepts, rigged 3D models, UI art, and authored AI-assisted audio
- Human product taste owns gameplay feel, art direction, and final acceptance

## Core Expertise

- Agentic AI systems and autonomous software delivery
- LLM orchestration, MCP servers, vision/OCR, NLP, and evaluation
- Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis
- Native SwiftUI iOS and Kotlin/Jetpack Compose Android development
- Godot 4.7, GDScript, game systems, automated capture, and native exports
- AWS, Vercel, Ubuntu/Linux, Docker, CI/CD, and real-time data systems
- Technical leadership, system architecture, product strategy, and code review

## Background

Austin moved from truck driving into software, became a web-development instructor at Bitwise Industries and Geekwise Academy, and then co-founded LineCrush. He is a father of two and a hands-on technical leader who can move from product direction to low-level implementation and production proof.

## Independent Public Projects

- [Bible AI Explorer](https://github.com/spragginsdesigns/bible-ai-explorer): AI-powered scripture study
- [AI Tutor WebApp](https://github.com/spragginsdesigns/ai-tutor-webapp): Socratic learning assistant
- [Perplexity MCP Server](https://github.com/spragginsdesigns/perplexity-mcp-server): Model Context Protocol integration
- [SaveALife CPR](https://github.com/spragginsdesigns/savealife-cpr): Business workflow automation

## Hiring Fit

Austin is a strong fit for teams that need a senior builder who can architect AI-native products, create reliable agent workflows, own the full stack, and turn ambiguous product goals into proven production systems.
